title: Smoky Juicy Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: Tender lamb kebabs infused with the rich flavors of the Mediterranean, featuring a smoky twist and a hint of dry white wine, perfect for a light and refreshing dinner.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F (200°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together white wine, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano, if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of roasted vegetables, quinoa, or a simple green salad.
To add an extra smoky flavor, grill the kebabs over indirect heat for an additional 5 minutes after cooking.
